$schema_note: Machine-readable inventory of every fork-only customization. The meta-test backend/open_webui/test/util/test_fork_features_manifest.py is the single source of truth for what must exist after every upstream sync. Whenever a fork-only feature is added, changed, or removed, update this file in the same task. See FORK_NOTES.md > Fork Management Contract.

fork_features.summary: Anonymous public-share pages, snapshot-based /p/* routes, /api/v1/public-shares/* APIs, and the create/get/delete chat-await fix.
PublicShareHostMiddleware that restricts the anonymous host to read-only routes.
Admin > General Enable Public Links + Public Link URL with PersistentConfig keys ui.enable_public_chat_sharing and ui.public_share_base_url.
OpenRouter Zero Retention model discovery (/endpoints/zdr) and provider.zdr enforcement on outgoing chat/responses/proxy/browser-direct payloads.
Settings > About fork disclosure that this deployment is a customized fork unaffiliated with the official Open WebUI team.
Surface-aware hover/focus emphasis system and narrower content columns for Settings/Admin modals, including the workspace prompt-suggestion alignment fix.
Notes Markdown / .txt import with replace/append/insert-at-cursor modes, clipboard paste-as-Markdown / copy-as-Markdown helpers, mobile two-line layout, and submenu/clipboard fixes.
WEB_SEARCH_RESULT_COUNT enforcement across the deduplicated combined result set during automatic web search.
Helper task endpoints force params.function_calling='default' and clear inherited tool_ids/tool_servers/features so builtin tool exposure does not leak into title/follow-up/etc. helper calls.
Defensive response-content parsing plus Merge Responses frontend SSE parser for Chat Completions and Responses API payloads (LM Studio / Chutes compatibility).

Blank-exception-to-human-readable conversion, streamed timeout/stream-stall messaging, _clean_proxy_headers stripping stale encoding headers, first-meaningful-chunk idle-timeout skip (including Responses preludes), and fetch_url Web Loader timeout fallback.
Session cleanup renews its Redis lock on a cadence shorter than the lock TTL to prevent worker churn on multi-worker deployments.
env.py CHANGELOG parser tolerates an Unreleased heading without breaking imports or image builds.

pending_workflow_improvements.summary: Replace the manual replay-onto-temporary-worktree upstream sync with a git merge/rebase workflow so dropped patches surface as loud conflicts instead of silent omissions. (FORK_NOTES.md Pending Improvements item C.)
